name: Pork Roast Master Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any packaging from the roast and separate it into two individual loins.
2. Make small slits in the roast and insert the garlic slices.
3. Place the roast fat side up on a rack in a shallow baking pan with space between the loins.
4. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
5. Roast until a meat thermometer inserted into the center registers 155°F (68°C), which typically takes 60-70 minutes.
6. Let the roast rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
7. Slice and serve one-third of the roast.
8. Wrap and refrigerate or freeze the remaining portion for use in Pork and Black Bean Burritos and Pork Minestrone Soup.
Serves: 4
Tip: The drippings can be used to make gravy to accompany the roast. The roast can be used for three meals.
